ModMetaData.author: karbonpanzer
ModMetaData.name: Vesperia - The Terminus Guard
ModMetaData.description: End of the Frontier, adds a new faction, scenario, and items.\n\nThe Frontier Era is ending, civilization and industrialization is heading for the Rimworlds. The head of this endeavour is a faction called the Dominion, a plutocratic empire who are now seeking to increase their profits on the back of your world. Do you collaborate or do you resist!?
